headline: Thermo Fisher Tests SpheriCal Calibration As Potential Edge In Mass Spectrometry
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) has entered a Material Transfer Agreement with Polymer Factory Sweden AB. The agreement covers evaluation of Polymer Factory's SpheriCal® calibration technology in Thermo Fisher's mass spectrometry workflows. The arrangement focuses on technical assessment and does not imply any commercial launch or revenue commitments. For investors watching NYSE:TMO, this development sits alongside a share price of $475.66 and a mixed return profile. The stock is up...
